description_long: This armchair features a bold, geometric design with a deep reddish-brown color and angular, blocky contours. The seat and backrest are broad and flat, with thick, rectangular armrests that extend forward in parallel lines. The front panel is decorated with a striking black geometric pattern, adding a modern, artistic flair to the otherwise solid color. The legs are short, square, and dark, providing a sturdy base and slight elevation from the ground. The upholstery appears smooth and untextured, with no visible seams or cushions, giving the chair a minimalist, monolithic appearance. The overall construction suggests a piece intended for contemporary urban environments, blending functionality with visual impact.
description: A modern, geometric armchair with a deep reddish-brown color, blocky armrests, and a striking black pattern on the front panel. The design is minimalist and sturdy, with smooth upholstery and short, square legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold black geometric pattern on the lower panel and the wide, flat seat and armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, rectangular armrest and the layered, blocky profile of the backrest.
description_view_2: Top-down front view displaying the broad seat, parallel armrests, and the overall symmetry of the chair.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a visible black accent on the side panel and the same blocky armrest design.
attribute_armrest_design: blocky, rectangular, upholstered in the same material as the rest of the chair
attribute_backrest_style: tall, straight, and flat with a solid, rectangular profile
